meaning: n.扳钳,扳手,猛扭,痛苦,扭伤,歪曲vt.猛扭,使扭伤,曲解,抢,折磨vi.猛扭,绞痛
examples: Leaving home was a terrible wrench for me.
Adjustable wrench for turning off gas and water.
I ran to several stores before I found the wrench.
The crisis convinced Higgins he had to wrench the utility through a 180-degree course correction.
An assembly line means you have stations and you have experts who tighten the wrench.
